name: Mia Farrow
abstract: Maria de Lourdes Villiers "Mia" Farrow ( mə-REE-ə dee LOORDZ VIL-yərz FARR-oh; born February 9, 1945) is an American actress and activist. She first gained notice for her role as Allison MacKenzie in the prime-time television soap opera Peyton Place and gained further recognition for her subsequent short-lived marriage to Frank Sinatra.

concerts.label: Requiem for Darfur
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Peter Erskine
about_quotes.evidence: And they interviewed the cinematographer who worked on “Rosemary’s Baby.” ... the character that Mia Farrow is portraying is sitting on the phone speaking to someone.
